data.speaker: Thistle
data.text: You came back? You actually came back. With that little sprout at your heel?

data.speaker: Thistle
data.text: Oh, this is rich. You think your sweet little chosen friend is any match for mine? Mine does what it is told. Mine does not get scared. Watch.

data.speaker: Thistle
data.text: Thistle does not lose his own meadow to a keeper with mud still on their boots. Come on then. Come and see.
